address: Huai Phai, Khong Chiam District, Ubon Ratchathani
opening_hours: Room types, check-in rules, and current riverside operations should be rechecked directly with the property before booking.

description.en: A practical Khong Chiam-side stay base for travelers who want earlier access to Pha Taem and the Mekong district instead of a long day trip from Ubon city.
description.nl: Een praktische verblijfsbasis aan de Khong Chiam-kant voor reizigers die eerder bij Pha Taem en het Mekongdistrict willen zijn in plaats van een lange dagtrip vanuit Ubon-stad.

highlights: Useful for early Pha Taem starts
Better as a route base than as a destination in itself

metaDescription.en: Why PK Riverside Resort works as a Khong Chiam-area stay base when you want to structure a stronger Pha Taem and Mekong route.
metaDescription.nl: Waarom PK Riverside Resort werkt als verblijfsbasis in de regio Khong Chiam als je een sterkere Pha Taem- en Mekong-route wilt opbouwen.

enhanced_description:
PK Riverside Resort should be read primarily as a route decision, not as a sightseeing attraction. Its value is that staying on the Khong Chiam side can make a Pha Taem and Mekong itinerary cleaner, especially if sunrise timing, multiple park stops, or a slower river district pace matter to you.

Because accommodation details can change faster than attraction facts, the right approach here is conservative. Treat it as one possible Mekong-side base and recheck exact room setup, riverside access, and current pricing directly before relying on old listings.
detailed_history: Public tourism material frames Khong Chiam and the Pha Taem side of Ubon as a stronger outer-district Mekong route than a same-day city add-on, which is why a riverside stay base can make logistical sense here even when the property itself is not a major destination.
visitor_experience: Expect a functional overnight base for the Khong Chiam side of the province. The decision is mainly about lowering driving friction and improving timing for nature stops rather than about staying at a luxury destination.

best_time_to_visit.time_of_day: Best chosen when you are structuring an overnight Mekong-side route
best_time_to_visit.crowd_level: Varies by season and current occupancy

practical_info.how_to_get_there: Use private transport, driver, or a self-drive route through Khong Chiam district.
practical_info.nearby_attractions: Khong Chiam, the Two-Color River, and Pha Taem National Park.
practical_info.food_options: Plan most serious meals around Khong Chiam town or your day route rather than around the resort alone.
practical_info.shopping: Minimal; this is a stay base, not a retail stop.

insider_tips: Choose this kind of base only if the Khong Chiam side is central to your route.
Reconfirm room inventory and river-facing setup directly before booking.
Do not treat old room-price claims as fixed.
verified_note: Conservative property summary based on destination context plus publicly visible listing data. Room types, rates, and riverside features should be rechecked directly with the operator.
cultural_significance: The resort matters mainly as a practical tool for structuring a better Khong Chiam and Pha Taem itinerary, not as a cultural attraction in its own right.
